method: 4-rater independent blind polarity rating + majority vote with HowNet S_C/S_E hint tiebreaker
rubric: Three-way polarity (P/N/U); affective sememe iff directly describes how experiencer feels
preferred_metric_rationale: Polarity is an ordered category (negative < neutral < positive); 11 of 15 disagreements are adjacent (P<->U or U<->N), 4 antipodal (P<->N) — ordinal metric properly weights disagreement distance.
release_note: Enriched with role-typed DEF-tree edges and frequency grounding from the source extraction. Polarity adjudication fields are unchanged from v1.1.
